description_long: This is a modern two-story house situated on a sloped plot with a prominent retaining wall at the front. The structure features a flat roof and a clean, rectangular form, with large windows on the main facade providing ample natural light. The house is elevated above street level, accessible via a driveway and a set of steps leading to the main entrance. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and gray, with contrasting textures between the smooth upper walls and the rougher retaining wall below. The surrounding landscape includes a paved driveway, walkways, and a large grassy area. The overall design emphasizes minimalism and functionality, with a focus on geometric lines and open outdoor space.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a prominent retaining wall, set on a sloped plot with a driveway and grassy yard. The design is minimalist, featuring clean lines and contrasting textures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, large windows, driveway, steps, and the retaining wall supporting the elevated house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the house, the driveway, and the transition from the street to the elevated entryway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, the back wall with minimal window openings, and the full extent of the retaining wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the grassy yard, the side elevation of the house, and the slope of the terrain.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows on the main facade
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway accessed by steps, featuring a simple door with minimal overhang and no decorative columns.
